'''Xeran''' was a [[Xamster/Legends|Xamster]] who helped [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] get into [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor's]] fortress. Xeran gave Boba an orb of spores from the [[malvil-tree]] [[Malubi]] that would weaken the [[Mazariyan]] around Wat Tambor's fortress.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
